name: Onion Smothered Brisket
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the garlic powder, paprika, and pepper and rub into the brisket.
2. Heat the oil in a Dutch oven and sear the brisket on all sides.
3. Remove the brisket and set aside.
4. Saute the onions in the Dutch oven.
5. Replace the brisket and cover it totally with onions.
6. Cover tightly and place in an oven preheated to 275 degrees Fahrenheit for 3 to 4 hours.
